title: FrontierMath v2 上线，GPT-5.5 与 Google AI 领先
full_text:
Epoch AI on X: "FrontierMath: Tiers 1–4 (v2) is live.
We concluded an audit that addressed errors in 42% of problems. Rankings are similar but scores are higher across the board. The current leaders are GPT-5.5 (xhigh) with 85% on Tiers 1–3 and Google’s AI co-mathematician with 76% on Tier 4. https://t.co/DH9nhpKH0N" / X
Post

We concluded an audit that addressed errors in 42% of problems. Rankings are similar but scores are higher across the board. The current leaders are GPT-5.5 (xhigh) with 85% on Tiers 1–3 and Google’s AI co-mathematician with 76% on Tier 4.
5:35 PM · Jun 12, 2026 91.5K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: FrontierMath： Tiers 1-4 （v2） 现已上线。 我们完成了一项审计，修正了 42% 的问题中的错误。排名相似，但整体得分更高。目前的领先者是 GPT-5.5 （xhigh），在 Tiers 1-3 上达到 85%，以及 Google 的 AI co-mathematician，在 Tier 4 上达到 76%。

4. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Rankings are similar but scores are higher across the board.
5. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] The current leaders are GPT-5.
6. [number / daily_observation, heatmap, case, trend / high] 5 (xhigh) with 85% on Tiers 1–3 and Google’s AI co-mathematician with 76% on Tier 4.
